overall.description: A stationary first-person view looking up at a glitching holographic billboard advertisement for 'Watson Whore' in a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The scene features towering neon-lit skyscrapers and flickering digital displays typical of a high-density urban commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk commercial street with holographic billboards

events.description: holographic billboard glitches, text briefly disappears and image distorts
billboard flickers white then resets with partial text visibility
billboard content glitches again with digital artifacts and text fading

agents.ego_description: standing stationary looking up at the glitching holographic advertisement

entered.detail: large vertical holographic advertisement with pink neon text reading WATSON WHORE and schedule information
colorful advertisement panel showing cereal or pastry product with bright graphics
tall futuristic building facade with illuminated windows and red neon vertical accents
industrial metal beams and framework supporting the suspended billboards

segments.scene_description: The camera remains fixed looking up at a large glitching holographic billboard in a futuristic cyberpunk city. The 'Watson Whore' advertisement flickers with digital distortion, periodically losing text and image clarity while surrounded by towering neon-lit buildings. The environment is devoid of pedestrians, emphasizing the empty commercial street at night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a fixed first-person perspective looking up at a malfunctioning holographic advertisement within a desolate cyberpunk cityscape. It begins with a steady gaze at the large Watson Whore billboard, which flickers with erratic digital distortion. As the glitches intensify, the advertisement periodically loses its text and image clarity against the backdrop of towering neon-lit skyscrapers. The scene remains centered on this flickering display, emphasizing the oppressive scale of the surrounding architecture and the eerie silence of the empty commercial street at night.
